dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8391 IH: To amend titles XVIII and XIX of the Social Security Act to require coverage of certain food and nutrition services under the Medicare and Medicaid programs.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ruiz introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend titles XVIII and XIX of the Social Security Act to require coverage of certain food and nutrition services under the Medicare and Medicaid programs.

section.header: Requiring coverage of certain food and nutrition services under Medicare and Medicaid

paragraph.text: Section 1861(s)(2) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395x(s)(2)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in subparagraph (JJ), by striking and at the end;
in subparagraph (KK), by adding and at the end; and
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:
food and nutrition services meeting such requirements as the Secretary shall specify;

paragraph.text: Section 1833(a)(1) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395l(a)(1)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting before the semicolon at the end the following: , and (II) with respect to specified food and nutrition services under section 1861(s)(2)(LL), the amounts paid shall be equal to 80 percent of the actual charge for the services.

paragraph.text: The amendments made by this subsection shall apply to items and services furnished on or after the date that is 180 days after the date of the enactment of this section.
Section 1905(a) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396d(a)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (31), by striking and at the end;
by redesignating paragraph (32) as paragraph (33); and
by inserting after paragraph (31) the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: food and nutrition services meeting such requirements as the Secretary shall specify; and
Section 1902(a)(10)(A) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396a(a)(10)(A)) is amended, in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking and (30) and inserting (30), and (32).
The amendments made by this subsection shall apply to items and services furnished on or after the date that is 180 days after the date of the enactment of this section.
